A [[Prince/Legends|princess]] of the Royal Family of Eiattu, daughter of Emperor [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]] and elder sister of [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo]], '''Kassen''' was murdered by rebellious Eiattuan nobles together with the rest of the royal family.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Most members of the Eiattu Royal Family had rather long names and shorter nicknames used on informal occasions. It is highly likely that "Kassen" was such a nickname, and thus we can't know the princess' full given name.
